character.definition: to run away; to flee; to escape; to evade, (interchangeable 達) to reach; to arrive at, to walk away without meeting each other
(a simplified form of 碽) sound of bumping or striking, arched bridge
dead (withered) crops; dried grains; (same as 䎩) to till; to plough; to cultivate
to cut; to mince; to slice; to carve
(same as 寺) a government agency, the court, a eunuch
to whisper. to blame to slander
raise feet; town in Shandong province
Gongche character shang with downward slash
